faqs.question: Why are crickets so common in Oceanside homes?
faqs.answer: Oceanside's coastal location provides the moisture and humidity crickets thrive in. They're attracted to outdoor lighting near the water and often enter homes through small cracks, especially in basements and ground-level areas common in Long Island architecture.
